emotion_and_vibe: Grounded, clear, growing, trustworthy, un-intimidating. It breaks the 'techy/hacker' SEO vibe, making it approachable for small business owners. Growth is represented by nature and earthy tones, not neon arrows.

typography.heading_strategy: Use Cabinet Grotesk for all H1-H4. Keep letter spacing tight (tracking-tight) for large headings.
typography.body_strategy: Use Outfit for all body text, dashboard labels, and metrics.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, and p-12 extensively to let content breathe.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Tight density but soft aesthetics.
layout_and_spacing.landing_page_grid: The 'Bento' Grid for features. Asymmetrical layouts, overlapping organic shapes.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for cards and modals. rounded-full for primary action buttons to make them feel tactile and friendly.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px subtle border (border-[#E5E0D8]), no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft shadow (shadow-lg).
surface_strategies.headers: Solid background (#FDFBF7) with a hard bottom border (#E5E0D8). Never transparent over scrolling content.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Avoid heavy glassmorphism as it feels too 'techy'. Stick to solid, earthy tactile surfaces.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons must smoothly transition to lighter hues. Cards lift slightly.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use organic, slow-spinning indicators. Avoid rapid tech-like loaders.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2D3E32] text-white hover:bg-[#4A5F4F]. Secondary: bg-[#E07A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#C86A51]. Outline: border border-[#2D3E32] text-[#2D3E32] hover:bg-[#F3F0E9].
components.inputs: Shadcn customized: bg-white border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#81B29A] focus:border-transparent text-[#1A201A].
components.scorecards: For SEO audits, use circular progress charts. Color code: #81B29A (Good), #E6A57E (Average), #E07A5F (Poor).
components.tables: Clean, cardless tables with border-b only on rows. text-sm text-[#5C685C].

iconography.style: Soft, rounded stroke, 1.5px to 2px weight. Avoid sharp geometric icons.

urls.description: Woman standing beside table in plant shop
Friendly woman holding clear drinking glass

image_strategy.treatment: Images should have rounded-2xl corners. Never use heavy black overlays. If overlay is needed, use a subtle warm gradient (from-[#2D3E32]/40 to-transparent).

page_specific_instructions.landing_page: Hero: High contrast typography, warm alabaster background, image of small business owner. Features: Bento grid using sage and terracotta accent cards. Pricing: Simple, non-intimidating tiers.
page_specific_instructions.auth: Split screen: left side is a soft green plant/growth image, right side is the login form. Form must feel spacious.
page_specific_instructions.dashboard: Use the 'Control Room' grid but with earthy colors. No dark mode. Focus on clear 'Next Actions' for the user instead of overwhelming them with charts.
page_specific_instructions.seo_audit: The audit entry should be a massive, friendly input field in the center of the screen. Results page: Break down technical SEO into human terms ('How fast your site loads', 'What Google reads').
page_specific_instructions.ai_generator: Use the terracotta accent for AI actions to make it feel like a creative spark. The generator interface should be conversational, not like a terminal.
page_specific_instructions.keyword_research: Data tables should be airy. Highlight 'low hanging fruit' keywords with the Sage Green color.
page_specific_instructions.project_detail: Show a history timeline. Use Recharts for trend lines (colored in Forest Green with soft sage gradients below the line).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure Forest Green text on Alabaster meets APCA guidelines. Use Text Shadow on images if text is overlaid.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, scorecards) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='audit-submit-btn').
